Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr

Record Class LogicalPlan.Join

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.logical_expr.LogicalPlan.Join
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, LogicalPlan
Enclosing interface:
LogicalPlan
public static record LogicalPlan.Join(LogicalPlan left, LogicalPlan right, JoinType joinType, JoinConstraint joinConstraint, List<Expr> onLeftKeys, List<Expr> onRightKeys, Optional<Expr> filter, NullEquality nullEquality, org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.Schema schema, LogicalPlanBridge bridge) extends Record implements LogicalPlan
Joins two relations on join conditions.

  • Constructor Details

    • Join

      public Join(LogicalPlan left, LogicalPlan right, JoinType joinType, JoinConstraint joinConstraint, List<Expr> onLeftKeys, List<Expr> onRightKeys, Optional<Expr> filter, NullEquality nullEquality, org.apache.arrow.vector.types.pojo.Schema schema, LogicalPlanBridge bridge)
      Creates an instance of a Join record class.
      Parameters:
      left - the value for the left record component
      right - the value for the right record component
      joinType - the value for the joinType record component
      joinConstraint - the value for the joinConstraint record component
      onLeftKeys - the value for the onLeftKeys record component
      onRightKeys - the value for the onRightKeys record component
      filter - the value for the filter record component
      nullEquality - the value for the nullEquality record component
      schema - the value for the schema record component
      bridge - the value for the bridge record component

  • Method Details

    • inputs

      public List<LogicalPlan> inputs()
      Description copied from interface: LogicalPlan
      Returns the direct child input plans of this node. 
      List<LogicalPlan> children = plan.inputs();
      Specified by:
      inputs in interface LogicalPlan
      Returns:
      immutable list of child plans
      See Also:
      • Rust DataFusion: LogicalPlan::inputs

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
